children.title_ja: 軽傷、または皮膚・皮下組織・筋の表在性損傷 軽微な骨折を伴う、または伴わない
children.title_en: minor or superficial to skin, subcutaneous tissue and muscle with or without minor fracture(s)
children.description_ja: 全身損傷（爆傷） 詳細不明ᵃ > 軽傷、または皮膚・皮下組織・筋の表在性損傷 軽微な骨折を伴う、または伴わない

children.title_en: major or extensive (>25% TBSA) to skin, subcutaneous tissue and muscle with multiple fractures and/or multiple organ injuries

children.title_ja: 重症；脳、胸部かつ／または腹部の多発性の臓器損傷 一肢以上の四肢欠損かつ／または断頭を伴う
children.title_en: massive: multiple organ injury to brain, thorax and/or abdomen with loss of one or more limbs and/or decapitation
children.description_ja: 全身損傷（爆傷） 詳細不明ᵃ > 重症；脳、胸部かつ／または腹部の多発性の臓器損傷 一肢以上の四肢欠損かつ／または断頭を伴う
children.description_en: Whole Body (explosion-type) Injury NFSᵃ > massive: multiple organ injury to brain, thorax and/or abdomen with loss of one or more limbs and/or decapitation
